channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: What does a US naval blockade of Iran mean for oil flows?

Matched titles:
- US expected to start naval blockade of Iranian ports after deadline passes
- US begins blockade of Iran's ports, Tehran threatens to retaliate

- US blockade of Iran a major military effort

- Iranian ships near US blockade will be eliminated: Trump
- Iran’s Baghaei criticises US blockade, slams threats against ships
- Trump says Iranian 'fast-attack' ships that come close to US blockade will be eliminated
- US forces enforce total naval blockade on Iran

- Iran threatens to retaliate for US blockade
- Iran threatens to retaliate for US blockade
- Iran warns of regional port threats as US plans blockade
- United States military to begin blockade of Iranian ports on Monday
- Iran warns of regional port threats as US plans blockade
- Iran warns of regional port threats as US plans blockade
- US blockade of Iran will be major military endeavour: experts
- US to blockade Iran after talks fail to yield a deal
- US to blockade Iran after talks fail to yield a deal

- US military to block ships from Iranian ports after talks yield no agreement
